properties.Test Case: A book prepared for Device format should display in Bloom Reader preview and BR device the same as seen in Edit. In particular make sure descenders are not cut off, even when the bubble is tight around the text.
properties.Steps: A book prepared for Device format should display in Bloom Reader preview and BR device the same as seen in Edit. In particular make sure descenders are not cut off, even when the bubble is tight around the text.

properties.Test Case: Do various things with transparency, including changing bubble types. N.B. transparency is not available for Captions by design and if you change a bubble with transparency to Caption, the transparency will be removed.
properties.Steps: Do various things with transparency, including changing bubble types. N.B. transparency is not available for Captions by design and if you change a bubble with transparency to Caption, the transparency will be removed.

properties.Test Case: Add a "Just Text". Click on Background color. Click in the top palette box. The transparency should switch to 100% and display that color.
properties.Steps: Add a "Just Text". Click on Background color. Click in the top palette box. The transparency should switch to 100% and display that color.

properties.Test Case: Child bubbles. Add, delete, move, resize. Ensure child bubbles inherit colours from parent and changing either parent or child affects the other.
properties.Steps: Child bubbles. Add, delete, move, resize. Ensure child bubbles inherit colours from parent and changing either parent or child affects the other.
